refnamediv.refpurpose: Return metadata for a loaded OpenCV DNN model

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: info = dnn_info(net) info = dnn_info(net, input_size, channels)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a struct with model name, type, backend, target, layer names, output layer names, layer types, layer count, and optional FLOPS estimate.

refsection.title: Examples
